insights: The market shows strong resilience with the current total (1387) sitting above both the 7-day and 30-day averages, indicating a positive momentum shift.
Data engineering and infrastructure roles are showing significant late-period growth, suggesting companies are prioritizing foundational technical scaling over experimental ML roles.
Unicorn and FAANG+ hiring tiers remain stable and elevated, providing a solid floor for the new graduate job market despite minor fluctuations in secondary categories.
